query:
SELECT t.typname, e.enumlabel
FROM pg_type t
JOIN pg_enum e ON t.oid = e.enumtypid
WHERE t.typname ILIKE '%closed%' OR t.typname ILIKE '%reason%'
ORDER BY t.typname, e.enumsortorder;
